3007830.name: Woohoo! - Game "Skee Madness"
3007830.description:
Skee Madness is a game where you roll the ball with force down a table and then the ball flies through the air towards a group of holes. You earn points depending on which hole the ball goes through.

There are 3 game modes:
  • Free mode: Allows you to roll an unlimited number of balls with no time limit.
  • Limit mode: You get 12 balls to roll.
  • Clocked mode: You get 30 seconds to roll as many balls as you can.

When you buy and install this DLC, the mini-game will appear on the main menu as an option in the games list.
Click or touch the game in the games list to start a new game.

Touchscreen Support

Woohoo! - Game "Skee Madness" supports touchscreens. You can also use a stylus pen or your finger to roll the ball.
(Touchscreen-enabled laptop or tablet required.)
